date_notes: Contract expiry date confirmed by ATA collective bargaining page (ev_033). Formal central bargaining began September 1 2024.
title_en: Alberta teachers' collective agreement expires — bargaining begins
title_fr: La convention collective des enseignants albertains expire — les négociations commencent
description_en: The teachers' collective agreement between the Alberta Teachers' Association (ATA) and the Teachers' Employer Bargaining Association (TEBA) expires August 31 2024. Formal central bargaining begins September 1 2024. The contract covered approximately 51,000 teachers across public, Catholic, and francophone school jurisdictions. Key ATA bargaining priorities entering negotiations: wage increases indexed to inflation (teacher wages had fallen behind the national average during the UCP era), hard class-size caps by grade level, and increased educational assistant supports for students with complex needs.

relations.note: Opening event of the 2025 teachers' strike sequence.
